status_notes: Initial sweep entry — not deeply researched.
notes: See also registry/control/kr/or/kisa.json for KISA (a MSIT-affiliated agency that certifies K-ISMS/ISMS-P and CSAP).

data.official_name: Framework Act on the Development of Artificial Intelligence and the Establishment of a Foundation for Trustworthiness
data.description: Korea's first comprehensive AI statute. Establishes a risk-based framework (with a 'high-impact AI' category), obligations for AI business operators (transparency, safety, human oversight), and a national AI policy/promotion structure. Took effect January 22, 2026, with MSIT as lead regulator.

data.official_name: Act on Promotion of Information and Communications Network Utilization and Information Protection, Etc.
data.description: Korea's foundational network-utilization and cybersecurity-incident-reporting statute, enacted 1986 (Act No. 3848), heavily amended since (most recent amendments effective August 14, 2024 strengthening breach-reporting obligations). Predates and complements PIPA (secid:regulation/pipc.go.kr/pipa) — most personal-information provisions moved to PIPA in the 2020 'Data 3 Laws' reform; this Act still covers ISP obligations, spam/malware provisions, and network breach notification.
